title: MAL exeption on SQL query with subquery in the where part
poc: SELECT * FROM (SELECT 0 AS "value") AS row WHERE row.value = (SELECT 0) AND row.value = 0;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT 0 AS "value") AS row WHERE row.value = 0 AND row.value =(SELECT 0);
with subquery in the where part;
key_bug_features: SQL query with subquery in the where clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 0), (2, NULL), (3, 5);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL) AND value = 0;
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id < 3);
